LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-29-2024 HEARING RE: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS, THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS. PAYEE IS TO RECEIVE THE AMOUNT OF $107,673.77. CONSENT ORDER SIGNED (SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING). JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Feb-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. KIM POMERANTZ, Esq. of Hoffman & Pomerantz, LLP (Tel: 310-371-2597) for Petitioner.
Payee Alicia Jones, in pro per present.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC's Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights.

Matter discussed. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants Petitioner's petition for approval for transfer of payment rights. Payee is to receive the amount of $107,673.77.

Consent order signed (see signed order for complete ruling).

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
